steps.title: Identify the point being compared
steps.content: The charity with the greatest percent of expenses spent on programs is the highest point on the scatterplot, about $(3400,92)$. The actual percent is therefore about $92$.

steps.title: Estimate the fit line at that x-value
steps.content: Use the drawn line of best fit to predict the percent at $x\approx3400$. Reading straight up to the line gives a predicted value slightly above $85\%$.

steps.title: Compute the residual
steps.content: The actual point is about $92\%$, and the prediction is slightly above $85\%$. The difference is slightly less than $7\%$, so the closest choice is B.
